title: BSc Software Engineering
shortDesc: Learn to design, develop and maintain complex software systems using modern methodologies.
overview: This degree provides a comprehensive understanding of software engineering principles, covering everything from coding and testing to project management and system architecture. You will gain practical experience through hands-on projects and industry placements, preparing you for a successful career in the fast-paced tech sector.
requirements: A-levels: BBB including Mathematics or Computer Science.

title: MSc Data Science
shortDesc: Master the skills to extract insights from complex data sets using advanced analytics and machine learning.
overview: Designed for students with a background in quantitative subjects, this program covers statistical modeling, machine learning algorithms, and big data technologies. You will work with real-world datasets and learn to communicate complex findings effectively, preparing you for roles in various industries.
requirements: 2:1 honours degree in a relevant quantitative subject (e.g., Mathematics, Computer Science, Physics).

title: BA Business Management
shortDesc: Develop leadership and management skills essential for navigating the modern global business environment.
overview: This program offers a broad understanding of business functions, including marketing, finance, human resources, and operations. You will develop critical thinking and problem-solving skills through case studies and practical projects, preparing you to lead and innovate in various organizational settings.

title: MSc Finance and Investment
shortDesc: Gain advanced knowledge of financial markets, investment strategies, and corporate finance.
overview: This specialized program equips you with the analytical skills and theoretical frameworks required for a successful career in the financial sector. You will study asset pricing, portfolio management, and risk assessment, gaining practical experience with industry-standard financial software.
requirements: 2:1 honours degree in a relevant subject (e.g., Finance, Economics, Accounting).

title: BA Fine Art
shortDesc: Explore your creative potential and develop a distinctive artistic practice across various media.
overview: This studio-based program encourages experimentation and critical reflection in painting, sculpture, digital media, and performance. You will benefit from dedicated studio space, access to specialized workshops, and guidance from practicing artists, culminating in a final year degree show.

title: MA Graphic Design
shortDesc: Refine your design thinking and technical skills to address complex visual communication challenges.
overview: This advanced program focuses on typographic experimentation, branding, interaction design, and visual narratives. You will work on self-directed projects and industry briefs, developing a professional portfolio that showcases your critical approach to graphic design.
requirements: 2:1 honours degree in Graphic Design or a closely related discipline. Portfolio submission required.

title: BSc Sports Science
shortDesc: Examine the scientific principles behind human performance, health, and exercise.
overview: This multidisciplinary program integrates physiology, biomechanics, and psychology to understand how the human body responds to exercise and sport. You will gain practical laboratory experience and have the opportunity to work with athletes and community groups.
requirements: A-levels: BCC including a science subject (e.g., Biology, PE, Psychology).

title: MSc Physiotherapy (Pre-registration)
shortDesc: An accelerated route to becoming a registered physiotherapist for graduates with a relevant science degree.
overview: This intensive program combines theoretical study with extensive clinical placements across various healthcare settings. You will learn to assess, diagnose, and treat a wide range of physical conditions, developing the skills required for autonomous practice.
requirements: 2:1 honours degree in a relevant science or health-related discipline. Evidence of clinical experience/shadowing required.

title: BSc Artificial Intelligence
shortDesc: Explore the principles and applications of AI, from natural language processing to robotics.
overview: This forward-looking program provides a deep dive into the algorithms and technologies that power intelligent systems. You will learn programming, mathematics, and cognitive science, preparing you to contribute to the rapidly evolving field of artificial intelligence.

title: MSc Digital Marketing
shortDesc: Develop the strategic and analytical skills needed to excel in the fast-paced digital marketing landscape.
overview: This program covers all aspects of digital marketing, including SEO, social media strategy, content marketing, and data analytics. You will work on real-world campaigns and learn how to leverage digital channels to drive business growth and engage with consumers.
modules: Consumer Behavior in the Digital Age

title: BA Architecture
shortDesc: Design the spaces of the future with a focus on sustainability, innovation, and social impact.
overview: This RIBA Part 1 exempted program blends creative design studio work with technical study in construction, environmental science, and architectural history. You will tackle complex design challenges and develop a portfolio that reflects your unique architectural vision.

title: MSc Public Health
shortDesc: Equip yourself to address global health challenges and improve population well-being.
overview: This program provides a comprehensive understanding of public health principles, epidemiology, and health policy. You will learn to analyze health inequalities, design intervention programs, and critically evaluate public health research, preparing you for leadership roles in health organizations.
requirements: 2:1 honours degree in a relevant discipline (e.g., Health Sciences, Sociology, Geography).
